methodology.allergens: Essential-only tagging from a 16-tag UAE/EU vocab (Celery, Gluten, Crustaceans, Fish, Eggs, Lupin, Molluscs, Mustard, Nuts, Peanuts, Sesame, Soya, Sulphites, Sugared drink, Dairy, Lentils). Tags applied only when the ingredient is a clearly identifiable carrier of the allergen — e.g., soy sauce → Soya + Gluten (wheat-containing); kani crab → Crustaceans + Fish (surimi). Empty results coded NO_ALLERGENS.
methodology.calories: USDA-style kcal per 100g reference table (cooked, edible-portion). Quantities normalised to grams (KG×1000) or millilitres (L×1000, ~1 g/ml for sauces). Packaging excluded. Wastage NOT applied (calories reflect plated EP). Per-piece items (sodas, nori sheets, taco shells, gyoza) use per-piece kcal estimates. Totals rounded to integer.
methodology.wastage_pct: Stored as decimal (10% → 0.10). Not applied to calorie or allergen calculations.

changelog.entry: Drift fix: zero-kcal beverages set to 0 (was null). Composite/placeholder recipes left null.
